name: Black Bean & Vegetable Burrito
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the peppers and carrots in olive oil until just barely tender.
2. Add mushrooms and corn; sauté until they reach a nice color.
3. Stir in brown sugar, chili powder, cumin, and salt.
4. Deglaze the pan with vinegar. If needed, add water to achieve desired moisture level.
5. Heat the beans through.
6. Warm tortillas for 45 seconds in a damp paper towel.
7. Fill with cooked mixture and serve with salsa and sour cream if desired.
